checks.name: Application boots with 110 controls and consistent v1.8.1 identity
Single-System remains the default with portfolio controls hidden
Portfolio creation establishes exactly 110 uninferred pending decisions for the anchor
v1.8.0 portfolio foundations migrate to 110 pending records per module without inference
Orphaned module requirement records are rejected
Guided conversion creates rollback plus 110 visible unresolved decisions
Adding a module atomically creates its complete 110-record decision set
Not-applicable save is blocked until a rationale is supplied
Individual review persists rationale, responsibility, and approval-tracking metadata
Bulk review updates only the currently visible family records
Unresolved-decision queue filters the selected module without hiding resolved records permanently
Portfolio JSON round trip preserves stable requirement identifiers and decisions
Deleting a leaf module also removes exactly its 110 decision records
Rollback restores the captured Single-System workspace
Legacy Single-System JSON migrates without enabling portfolio mode
